$comment: Design token file for the Mobile Date Picker - Pin Wheel (wheel item) component
$description: Component tokens for the Mobile Pin Wheel item - a single row in a scrolling wheel picker (date, hour, minute, or AM/PM value). Distance from the selection line drives its emphasis via three states: Far (dimmest), Close (mid), and Selected (highlighted). Atomic component - nested inside Pin Wheel Selector which references it rather than redefining these tokens. Figma Reference: Node ID 193-80319

$component.name: Pin Wheel
$component.description: One item/row in a scrolling wheel picker. The text emphasis (color) changes with proximity to the center selection line - far items are faint, close items are mid-tone, and the selected item is highlighted in primary.
$component.structure: 40px tall row with centered value text and 10px padding. Background is neutral base; the selected row additionally carries the selection band border (owned by Pin Wheel Selector).

usage.contexts: Pin Wheel Selector, Date Picker Mobile Pin Wheel view

height.description: Mobile pin wheel item row height - md - 40px

padding.description: Mobile pin wheel item padding - xs - 10px

background.description: Mobile pin wheel item background - neutral base - #ffffff

typography.description: Mobile pin wheel item value typography - 14px semibold

far.description: Mobile pin wheel item text - far state - neutral inactive - #d0d5dd

close.description: Mobile pin wheel item text - close state - neutral subtitle - #667085

selected.description: Mobile pin wheel item text - selected state - primary - #155eef
